metadata.title: Givernance — The Nonprofit CRM Built for Europe
metadata.description: GDPR-native CRM for European nonprofits (2–200 staff). Donor management, postal campaigns, online giving, grants, and impact reporting — without Salesforce complexity.
metadata.ogTitle: Givernance — The Nonprofit CRM Built for Europe
metadata.ogDescription: GDPR-native CRM for European nonprofits. Donor management, postal campaigns, online giving, grants, and reporting in one calm system.

nav.tagline: The nonprofit CRM built for Europe

hero.heading: Run your mission. Not your spreadsheets.
hero.description: Givernance is a GDPR-native CRM for European nonprofits. Manage donors, postal campaigns, online giving, grants, and impact reporting in one calm system — without Salesforce complexity or cost.
hero.subtext: AI-assisted by default. You stay in control of every sensitive decision. Fast to set up, affordable to run.

trustStrip.heading: Key benefits
trustStrip.gdprDescription: Consent, auditability, and privacy controls built in from the start.
trustStrip.postalDescription: Support the channels nonprofits actually use, not just generic forms.
trustStrip.aiDescription: AI suggests and explains. You confirm what matters.
trustStrip.dataDescription: Export everything, any time. No lock-in.

problem.heading: You chose Salesforce for the free seats. Then your team grew.
problem.description: Rising licence costs, consultant dependency, retrofitted GDPR workflows, and reporting workarounds in spreadsheets — sound familiar? You deserve a system built for how your organisation actually works.
problem.pain1: You pay more every time the team grows
problem.pain2: You depend on consultants for simple changes
problem.pain3: You patch GDPR across disconnected tools
problem.pain4: You adapt a US-centric model to European realities
problem.pain5: You struggle to export your own data cleanly
problem.alt1: One calm system for fundraising and operations
problem.alt2: Designed for European nonprofits from day one
problem.alt3: AI that helps — you stay in control
problem.alt5: Your data is always yours to export

fundraising.heading: Your campaigns. Your channels. One system.
fundraising.description: Plan nominative postal campaigns, generate QR-coded appeals, manage door-drops by geography, publish donation pages, connect Stripe, and track campaign ROI — all in one place.
fundraising.badge: Built around how European nonprofits actually raise funds.
fundraising.postalDescription: Personalised letters, merge fields, and print-ready PDFs — the workflow your team already runs.
fundraising.qrDescription: Every mailing carries a unique QR code so you know exactly which campaign drove which gift.
fundraising.doorDropDescription: Target geographic zones and automatically create constituent records when gifts arrive.
fundraising.donationDescription: Branded giving pages and embeddable widgets, live in minutes.
fundraising.stripeDescription: Your organisation connects its own Stripe account. Givernance never handles your funds.
fundraising.roiDescription: Cost vs. donations raised, broken down by channel — no spreadsheet required.

platform.heading: Your donors at the centre. Everything else connected.
platform.description: Givernance starts with the donor lifecycle — who gives, how much, and why — then connects programmes, grants, volunteers, and reporting around that relationship.
platform.bullet1: Donor lifecycle as the core model, not an add-on
platform.bullet2: Every module shares the same constituent record
platform.bullet3: Stays calm even when your workflows get complex
platform.donorsDescription: Constituents, gifts, receipts, lifecycle stages, and campaign attribution.
platform.grantsDescription: Applications, deadlines, tranches, and funder reporting.
platform.programmesDescription: Service delivery without fragmenting your constituent record.
platform.volunteersDescription: Shifts, hours, background checks, and recognition in one place.
platform.impactDescription: Connect outcomes to fundraising and operations data.
platform.financeDescription: Export journal entries and fund balances — not a full accounting system.

ai.heading: Less admin. Same control.
ai.description: AI handles the repetitive work — duplicate detection, data clean-up, suggested next steps — so your team can focus on relationships. You always decide what happens next.
ai.manualDescription: Full human control. AI stays out of the way.
ai.assistedDescription: The default. AI proposes and explains — your team decides.
ai.autopilotDescription: For routine work you trust to run automatically, with clear exceptions and full audit trails.
ai.guardrail: No irreversible action without your confirmation. Every AI decision is logged and auditable.

security.heading: GDPR-native. Not GDPR-patched.
security.description: Consent tracking, audit logs, data residency, and right-to-erasure are built in from day one — not bolted on after the fact. Your compliance team will thank you.
security.privacyDescription: Consent history, audit logs, and right-to-erasure — built in, not bolted on.
security.europeanDescription: Postal campaigns, SEPA payments, EU tax receipts, and finance handoff designed into the product.
security.calmDescription: Less configuration overhead, fewer consultants, more time for the work that matters.

resources.heading: Click through it yourself.
resources.description: Explore 86 interactive mockups across donor management, campaigns, compliance, reporting, and AI-assisted workflows. This is not a slide deck — it is a product you can navigate.
resources.dashboardDescription: Daily priorities, campaign health, donor follow-up.
resources.campaignDescription: Postal and digital workflows with QR attribution.
resources.donationDescription: Public giving flows with Stripe Connect.
resources.aiHubDescription: Guided work with explanations and audit trails.

cta.heading: Ready to see what calmer nonprofit software looks like?
cta.description: Book a 30-minute demo and walk through the workflows that matter most to your organisation — donor management, postal campaigns, online giving, and reporting.

footer.brandDescription: The GDPR-native CRM for European nonprofits. Calm, capable, affordable.
footer.tagline: Built by people who believe nonprofits deserve better software.

dashboard.action1: Send thank-you emails to 26 new donors
dashboard.action2: Review anomaly in QR campaign attribution
dashboard.action3: Confirm Stripe Connect onboarding for Fondation Horizon
